'''SkyCenter Galleria''' was an amusement park in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. It was owned by [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] whom also owned the ''[[GemDiver Station]]'' over [[Yavin Prime/Legends|Yavin]]. He was inspired to create the park after studying the [[Hologram Fun World]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Young Jedi Knights: Trouble on Cloud City]]''
